calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-11-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Karen Farnsworth, CSR #5162.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants US Cargo Inc. and Sukhdeep Singh.
Defaults entered against defendants on January 11, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on January 11, 2008.
Order waiving appearance of witness at default prove-up hearing filed March 5, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants US Cargo Inc. and Sukhdeep Singh as follows:

Damages/Principal - $107,095.43.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,132.06.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs $447.79, for a total of $116,175.43.

The Court further Orders that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the following leased equipment: one 1998 Utility Springride Trailer with Thermo King Reefer, VIN# 1UYVS2538WU219578; one 2003 Freightliner Century VIN# 1FUJBBCGX3PJ47577; one 2004 Kenworth T600 VIN# 1XKAD49X64J053290, and plaintiff is entitled to its immediate possession, and that plaintiff have and recover from defendants.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2008 Continued To Apr-11-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
